rawLevel: Advise against all but essential travel to parts
summary: The FCDO advises against all but essential travel to the far south of Thailand: the provinces of Pattani, Yala, Narathiwat, and the area of Songkhla province south of the A43 road between Hat Yai and Sadam, due to an ongoing insurgency involving bombings, shootings, and arson attacks. The rest of Thailand, including Bangkok, Chiang Mai, Phuket, and Koh Samui, is considered safe for travel.
